title: Darkest Souls 16X Weapon Textures
description: 16X Resolution Textures for Darkest Souls Weapons
body:
This Resource Pack aims to bring the look of [Darkest Souls](https://modrinth.com/mod/darkestsouls) Weapon Textures more in line with the artstyle of the vanilla game. This pack is still Work In Progress as it does not yet update all weapons but a good portion of them.

 
Current Version Contains:
- Broken Straightsword
- Longsword
- Bandit Knife
- Bandit Curved Sword
- Scimitar
- Falchion
- Battle Axe
- Claymore
- Flamberge
- Zweihander
- Uchigatana
- Frayed Blade
- Chikage
- Shotel
- Carthus Shotel
- Carthus Curved Greatsword
- Dark Sword
- Shadow Blade
- Huntsman Axe
- Huntsman Pitchfork
- Huntsman Cutlass
